skill_execution.question: Compare HAM vs LEC through Turn 3

sql:
WITH DriverFastestLaps AS (
    SELECT
        driver_number,
        lap_number,
        MIN(lap_time_sec) AS fastest_lap_time
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.corner_telemetry_sequences
    WHERE
        season = 2026
        AND event_name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
        AND session_type = 'Q'
        AND driver_number IN ('HAM', 'LEC')
    GROUP BY
        driver_number, lap_number
),
RankedFastestLaps AS (
    SELECT
        driver_number,
        lap_number,
        fastest_lap_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY driver_number ORDER BY fastest_lap_time ASC) as rn
    FROM
        DriverFastestLaps
)
SELECT
    t.driver_number,
    t.lap_number,
    t.measurement_label,
    ROUND(t.speed, 1) AS speed_kmh,
    ROUND(t.throttle, 1) AS throttle_percent,
    ROUND(t.brake, 1) AS brake_percent,
    t.gear
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.corner_telemetry_sequences AS t
JOIN
    RankedFastestLaps AS rfl
ON
    t.driver_number = rfl.driver_number
    AND t.lap_number = rfl.lap_number
WHERE
    t.season = 2026
    AND t.event_name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    AND t.session_type = 'Q'
    AND t.corner_number = 3
    AND rfl.rn = 1
ORDER BY
    t.driver_number,
    t.lap_number,
    t.measurement_index
LIMIT 50;
